scripts.build:all: pnpm run build && pnpm run build:repair
scripts.test: pnpm run build:all && node --test test/*.test.mjs test/repair/*.test.mjs dist/repair/*.test.js
scripts.test:repair: pnpm run build:repair && node --test test/repair/*.test.mjs dist/repair/*.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm run build:all && node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-include='dist/**/*.js' --test-coverage-exclude='dist/repair/*.test.js' --test-coverage-lines=49 --test-coverage-branches=66 --test-coverage-functions=57 test/*.test.mjs test/repair/*.test.mjs dist/repair/*.test.js
scripts.test:coverage:changed: pnpm run build:all && node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-include='dist/repair/fix-prompt-builder.js' --test-coverage-lines=85 --test-coverage-branches=85 --test-coverage-functions=85 test/repair/*.test.mjs dist/repair/*.test.js
scripts.lint: oxlint src --tsconfig tsconfig.json && oxlint src/repair --tsconfig tsconfig.repair.json
scripts.format: oxfmt --write src test package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.repair.json .oxfmtrc.json schema .github/workflows
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check src test package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.repair.json .oxfmtrc.json schema .github/workflows
scripts.check: pnpm run check:active-surface && pnpm run build:all && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:repair && pnpm run test:coverage:changed && pnpm run test:coverage && pnpm run format:check
